recommendations.title: Make It Happen
recommendations.overview: Embarking on a journey to fulfill her dreams as a dancer, a young girl discovers a new style of dance that will prove to be the source of both conflict and self-discovery.

recommendations.title: Honey: Rise Up and Dance
recommendations.overview: Street dancer Skyler comes out of the shadow of her trained dancer sister, Tosha, & joins a dance competition with the Honey dance studio; the prize is a college scholarship.

recommendations.title: Breakin'
recommendations.overview: A struggling young dancer joins forces with two breakdancers and together they become a street sensation.

recommendations.title: StreetDance 3D
recommendations.overview: In order to win the Street Dance Championships, a dance crew is forced to work with ballet dancers from the Royal Dance School in exchange for rehearsal space.

recommendations.title: Take the Lead
recommendations.overview: A former professional dancer volunteers to teach dance in the New York public school system and, while his background first clashes with his students' tastes, together they create a completely new style of dance. Based on the story of ballroom dancer

recommendations.title: Hairspray Live!
recommendations.genres: Romance, Comedy, Drama, TV Movie, Music
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl living in Baltimore in the early 1960s dreams of appearing on a popular TV dance show.

recommendations.title: StreetDance 2
recommendations.overview: After suffering humiliation by the crew Invincible, street dancer Ash looks to gather the best dancers from around the world for a rematch.

recommendations.title: Heartbeats
recommendations.overview: When a bubbly American hip hop dancer goes to India with her family for a wedding, she is impressed by a new dance style and falls in love with the man who introduced her to it.

recommendations.title: Out of the Clear Blue Sky
recommendations.overview: Returning to Earth as an imitator, the legendary Mexican artist Pedro Infante must prove that he is no longer a womanizer to enter paradise.

recommendations.title: Limelight
recommendations.overview: A fading music hall comedian tries to help a despondent ballet dancer learn to walk and to again feel confident about life.
